title: duplicate please delete ...sry
author: JensHKnudsen
body_snippet:
Trying to import an existing config trows error due to a hardcoded nonexisting path


## Crash Report

### Exception
**Type:** `System.ArgumentException`
**Message:** The directory name 'D:\github\mRemoteNG\mRemoteNG\bin\x64\Release\Settings' does not exist. (Parameter 'path')

### Stack Trace
```
   at void System.IO.FileSystemWatcher.CheckPathValidity(string path)
   at new System.IO.FileSystemWatcher(string path, string filter)
   at new mRemoteNG.Config.Connections.Multiuser.FileConnectionsU...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Hi @JensHKnudsen, thanks for reporting this!

This is related to #50 — we're investigating the root cause of these hardcoded paths. The crash you're seeing in `FileConnectionsUpdateChecker` happens because it tries to create a `FileSystemWatcher` on a path that doesn't exist on your machine.

We're working on a fix that will:
1. Use the correct portable settings path relative to where you extracted the app
2. Add defensive handling so the app doesn't crash even if the path is invalid

I'll link ...
